hero.title: Asuter n usenfaṛ n tuqqna
hero.lead: IATF yettnadi ɣef tsutwin n usenfaṛen n tuqqna i d-yettbeddlen seg uḥwaǧ n tidet.
support: Ur teḥwaǧeḍ ara isefka meqqren. D aɣbel ifazen, anwa i t-yettaɣen, d acuɣer i yesεa azal, d ayen ara yebdun.

intro: Iberdan merra ad kecmen deg yiwet n tmuɣli.

items.label: Asebtar web
items.body: Seqdec tifrat-a i d-yusan sdat akken ad d-tawiḍ asuter yettwahegga.

items.label: Asebter n yimayl
items.body: Ceyyeε asuter-nni srid ɣer {{contact.requestsEmail}}Isutren s yimayl zemren ad uɣalen d isefra n usuter n medden deffir ma rzan-ten-id.

items.label: Amennuɣ
items.body: Bdu-d syin ma d ayen isehlen. Asuter-nni mazal-it yettruḥ ɣer yiwet n tmuɣli.

guidance.title: Uqbel ad tazneḍ asuter
paragraphs: IATF ixeddem s wudem awurman. Tiɣriwin zemrent ad d-ssumant u ad ttwaffɣent d isekkilen n tiɣriyin awurmen deg tdukli n GitHub n l'IATF, deg usmel-agi, neɣ deg sin-a.

Ur ttekki ara deg-s tansa, uṭṭunen n tilifun, isallen imsujjiyen, neɣ isallen i d-yettakken iman-nsen ɣef imseqdacen n teknulujiyin imεawnen ala ma yella d ayen ilaqen yerna ur tesεiḍ ara aɣilif akken IATF ad t-iεawed.
IATF itekkes isefka n umsawal imdanen ur neḥwaǧ uqbel ad d-ssuffɣen isekkilen n usuter.

review.title: Asirem n uḥezzeb
paragraphs: Asekcem n usuter ur d-yettak ara lεali.
IATF yettnadi ɣef tiɣawsiwin i d-yettunefken ɣef lmendad n useqdec, tizemmar, lfayda, d ma yella leqdic-nni yella deg yiwen n usebter agejdan.
Kra n yisenfaren zemren ad ttwakksen, ad ttwaḥerzen, neɣ ad ttwabeddlen uqbel ad ten-qeblen.

fields.name: Abrid n umsawal
fields.label: Abrid n umsawal yettwafernen
fields.helper: Amek i ilaq ad d-yili unadi?

fields.name: Isebtaren i yellan ddaw-a:
fields.label: Timsal n umsawal
fields.helper: Tansa n yimayl neɣ tansa n Discord i unadi.
fields.placeholder: Tansa n yimayl neɣ tansa n usileɣ

fields.name: tutlayt
fields.label: Tutlayt
fields.helper: Tutlayt i k-iεeǧben, ma yella d ayen ilaqen.

fields.name: ugur
fields.label: Acu n wugur i tettnadiḍ ad t-tefruḍ?
fields.helper: Mmeslay-d ɣef lbaṭel-nni s wawalen isehlen.

fields.name: extraContext
fields.label: Aḍris-nniḍen
fields.helper: Rnu-d ayen nniḍen ara k-iεawnen ad d-tessegziḍ lebɣi-nni: acuɣer d ayen yesεan azal, imedyaten, isebtaren, tikti n uselkim, neɣ tiɣawsiwin n wakud.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: Tḥulfuḍ s usnulfu n uẓeṭṭa ufella?
fields.helper: Iseḍfaren i yettwaqeblen d isefka i d-yettunefken sɣur IATF.

header.title: D acu i d anamek n tqebleḍ

items: aḍebsi aɣelnaw deg taggayt n GitHub n IATF
d amsenǧer i d-yettunefken i usenfaṛ
taggayt copyleft i uḍris d isental n usenfaṛ
aḍris n uḍebsi deg usmel n IATF

header.title: Asuter yeqquren, yeṣfan, d ayen ara yebdun.

paragraphs: Ma yella tesɛiḍ yiwet n teḥwaǧt n tidet deg uḥezzeb yerna tettwaliḍ belli ilaq ad yuɣal d asenfaṛ agdud, ceggeɛ-aɣ-t-id.
